name: get_generated_clocks
short_description: Get a list of generated clocks in the current design
full_help:
get_generated_clocks

Description: 
Get a list of generated clocks in the current design

Syntax: 
get_generated_clocks  [-regexp] [-nocase] [-filter <arg>] [-of_objects <args>]
                      [-match_style <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose] [<patterns>]

Returns: 
list of clocks

Usage: 
  Name            Description
  ---------------------------
  [-regexp]       Patterns are full regular expressions
  [-nocase]       Perform case-insensitive matching (valid only when -regexp 
                  specified)
  [-filter]       Filter list with expression
  [-of_objects]   Get generated clocks of these pins, ports or nets
  [-match_style]  Style of pattern matching, valid values are ucf, sdc
                  Default: sdc
  [-quiet]        Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]      Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<patterns>]    Match generated clock names against patterns
                  Default: *

Categories: 
XDC, Object

arguments.description: Perform case-insensitive matching (valid only when -regexp specified)
